summary: REQ-1 appears partially implemented (audioSrc added to mock data), and a global playback mechanism (PlaybackContext + Layout-level AudioPlayer) was added that likely addresses REQ-2/REQ-3 for Home/Artist lists. However, the diff summary does not include any added/verified audio asset files under frontend/public/assets, so the “no 404” acceptance criterion cannot be confirmed from the provided changes. Several unrelated refactors/content centralizations and UI/style changes were also introduced beyond the BuildRequest.

missing_requirements.requirement: All referenced audioSrc paths resolve to files under frontend/public/assets/ and load successfully in the browser (no 404).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows audioSrc strings pointing to /assets/*.mp3, but it does not show any added/updated files under frontend/public/assets (or confirmation those mp3 files exist there). From the diff summary alone, successful loading/no-404 cannot be verified.

hallucinated_features.description: Centralized competitions data module and refactor of Competitions page to import from it.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by the BuildRequest (which focused only on making Home/Artist track lists playable).

hallucinated_features.description: Centralized rewards data module and refactor of Rewards page to import from it.
Centralized profile data module and changes to Profile page playback/data wiring.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by the BuildRequest (requirements only mention Home trending tracks and Artist profile popular tracks).

hallucinated_features.description: Upload page expanded into a comprehensive (still static) submission form UI.
hallucinated_features.reason: Explicitly out of scope/non-goal: no real uploads; also not required for enabling playback from track lists.

hallucinated_features.description: Global CSS/theme changes (OKLCH color system and gradient theme updates).
Added a comprehensive editing guide document.
